name: Bar Room Slaw (the Four Seasons Restaurant)
recipeIngredient: Assorted Vegetables (e.g., carrots, zucchini, red, green, and yellow bell peppers, celery, celeriac, summer squash, chayote, Chinese cabbage, daikon, black radish, turnip, white and red cabbage, cucumber, tomato, sugar snap peas, broccoli stems)
recipeInstructions:
1. Select vegetables according to season, personal preference, and complementarity of colors, textures, and tastes. Cut into very fine julienne by hand or shred fine in a food processor using the shredding disc.
2. Whisk egg yolks, lemon juice, mustard, salt, and pepper in a medium bowl until well blended. Add olive oil, drop by drop, whisking continuously, until the mixture is thick. Continue whisking in oil in a slow, steady stream. Stir in vinegar.
3. To serve, pour desired amount of dressing over julienne vegetables in a bowl; toss gently. Line individual salad plates with romaine lettuce, endive leaves (separated and rinsed), and watercress (rinsed and trimmed). Top with dressed vegetables, dividing evenly. Sprinkle with alfalfa sprouts.
Some vegetables to consider: carrot, zucchini, red, green, and yellow bell pepper, celery, celeriac, summer squash, chayote, Chinese cabbage, daikon, black radish, turnip, white and red cabbage, cucumber, tomato, sugar snap peas, broccoli stems. Julienned vegetables can be prepared ahead; refrigerate, wrapped in plastic wrap. Make dressing just before serving. Use one cup of julienne vegetables per person.
